---
title: 'Teaching Color Science to EECS Students Using Interactive Tutorials: Tools
  and Lessons'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- human_perception
url_source: https://library.imaging.org/ei/articles/35/1/VDA-396
journ: IS&T EI (VDA)
year: 2023
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 68
---
